description_long: This is an ornate, vintage-style candelabrum made of aged metal, featuring a central stem with a wide, fluted base for stability. The candelabrum has three candle holders, with two elegantly curved arms extending symmetrically from the central column, each ending in a cup-shaped holder. The metal surface displays a patina of greenish oxidation, suggesting age and exposure to the elements, and the base is decorated with embossed patterns. The candle holders are cup-shaped and designed to securely hold taper candles. The overall design is both decorative and functional, suitable for adding a touch of classic elegance to urban outdoor or indoor settings. The craftsmanship and weathered finish give it an antique, historical character.
description: A vintage, patinaed metal candelabrum with three candle holders and ornate, curved arms, standing on a wide, embossed base. Its aged finish and decorative design evoke classic elegance.
description_view_0: The candelabrum is seen from the side, showing the central stem and base, with only one candle holder visible and the arms not extended toward the viewer.
description_view_1: The front view reveals all three candle holders and the full extent of the ornate, curved arms, highlighting the symmetrical design.
description_view_2: Another side view, similar to view 0, with the central stem and base prominent, and the arms extending away from the viewer.
description_view_3: The back view mirrors the front, displaying all three candle holders and the decorative arms, with the base and stem clearly visible.
